chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 2611 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference. 22.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Razzaq, advocate holding brief for Mr. Zafar Imam, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Aqil Ahmed, advocate for the respondent. This reference application is pending since 2015 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even today Mr. Abdul Razzaq, advocate holding brief on behalf of the applicant’s counsel and seeks adjournment. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
